_meta.resume_note: The complete associate-degree and certificate table in Merritt College's official archived 2025-2026 catalog shows no general Biology/Biological Sciences AS-T, AS, or AA.

none_found_sources.locator: Historical 2025-2026 catalog, Associate Degrees and Certificates table; the Biology section lists Natural History and Resources only as a Certificate of Achievement and has no associate award

notes: Merritt's official 2025-2026 award table has a Biology department row, but its only listed program is the Natural History and Resources Certificate of Achievement. Biology courses and transfer preparation do not constitute a published Biology associate degree.
